name: manage_cron
description: Manage your own cron jobs at runtime — no restart needed. Changes take effect on the next minute tick. Actions: list (see all jobs), add (create new job), update (change schedule/prompt/enabled), remove (delete job), enable/disable (toggle without removing). Use this to schedule recurring tasks, one-shot reminders, or peer-pulse jobs for yourself.

schedule.description: Cron expression (required for add, optional for update). Examples: '0 3 * * *' (3am daily), '0 * * * *' (hourly), '*/30 * * * *' (every 30 min)

prompt.description: The prompt text the cron will inject as a message to trigger your inference cycle (required for add, optional for update)

enabled.description: Whether the job is active (default true for add)
